data.title: Listrak's 2026 Beauty & Fashion Benchmark Report highlights revenue impact of transactional messages for retailers.
data.description: In a recent report utilizing Listrak Intelligence, beauty and fashion brands can gain valuable insights for enhancing personalized cross-channel marketing strategies. Released on March 4, 2026 in Lititz, Pennsylvania, the report focuses on improving transactional and post-purchase communications for retailers in these sectors. This data-driven approach aims to optimize marketing efforts by delivering targeted messages to consumers.

data.title: Drew Edmond promoted to partner at Glenbrook, a payments strategy firm. Expert in merchant performance and ecosystem innovation.
data.description: A prominent payments strategy leader has been acknowledged for his role in enhancing merchant performance and fostering innovation within the ecosystem. Located in Miami Beach, Florida, Glenbrook Partners, a renowned strategy consulting firm specializing in the payments sector, recently announced the advancement of Drew. The achievement was publicized on March 4, 2026, via PRNewswire.

data.title: Scripps to buy WTVQ in Lexington, Kentucky from Morris Network for $15.8 million.
data.description: E.W. Scripps Company recently finalized a deal to acquire WTVQ, a prominent ABC affiliate station located in Lexington, Kentucky. The purchase was made from Morris Network, Inc. for a total of $15.8 million.

data.title: Southminster partners for arts-integrated wellness in CCRCs. Launches "Creative Aging on Prescription" study.
data.description: In Charlotte, NC on March 4, 2026, Southminster revealed its recent partnership to establish itself as a pioneer in arts-integrated wellness among continuous care retirement communities (CCRCs) nationwide. By joining forces with Lifetime Arts and Wake Forest University, Southminster aims to enhance the well-being of its residents through innovative programs combining arts and health.

data.title: Procare Solutions releases 2026 trends report on early childhood education; 4th annual report highlights industry insights.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Denver, Procare Solutions, a prominent provider of child care management software, published the fourth edition of the Child Care Business Trends Report. This report presents a comprehensive analysis of the current landscape influencing early childhood education in the upcoming year.

data.title: Goodal launches upgraded Green Tangerine Vita C Dark Spot Care Alpha Line in the US market to showcase advanced Korean skincare technology.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, Goodal, a top Korean skincare brand, unveiled the debut of its upgraded Green Tangerine Vita C Dark Spot Care Alpha Line. This line is an advanced iteration of the well-received Green Tangerine Vita C Dark Spot Care Line. The innovative new formulas bring cutting-edge technology to tackle dark spots and enhance skin health.

data.title: Brown Forman stock down as reported 3rd quarter EPS of 58 cents (beat est. of 48 cents) with sales of $1.056 billion.
data.description: Brown-Forman Inc (NYSE: BF) saw a drop in shares following the report of their third-quarter earnings, which stood at 58 cents per share. This figure exceeded the projected 48 cents by analysts. The company reported quarterly sales of $1.056 billion, surpassing the expected $1.003 billion. Whiskey brands experienced moderate growth year-to-date, driven by innovation and new Jack Daniel's flavors, although their core products like Tennessee Whiskey and Tennessee Honey saw a decline. Tequila sales also decreased, with brands like Herradura and el Jimador being impacted by lower U.S. volumes in a competitive market. Ready-to-drink beverages experienced an increase year-to-date due to high demand.

data.title: Avocados From Mexico and Chef Pati Jinich promote diabetes-friendly recipes for Hispanic communities.
data.description: Avocados From Mexico® has collaborated with Chef Pati Jinich to support Hispanic communities in improving their health by offering diabetes-friendly recipes without compromising on taste. The news was announced on 02-Mar-2026 through a press release from Avocados From Mexico via PR Newswire. The initiative aims to empower individuals to take control of their health through these flavorful recipes.

data.title: Echo360 awards 2026 e3 Tech Grants to 15 institutions in Asia-Pacific, totaling over $65,000 USD.
data.description: In New York on March 4, 2026, Echo360, a renowned global leader in innovative learning and AI-driven education technology through the EchosystemTM, revealed the 2026 beneficiaries in the Asia-Pacific region (APAC) for its e3 Tech Grants initiative. A total of over $65,000 USD was granted to recipients in the APAC market.
